title: Form Field Schema
description: Schema representing the structure of a form field definition

key.title: Field Key
key.description: Unique identifier for the field (camelCase, no spaces). Used to reference field values in forms

type.title: Field Type
type.description: Type of input control for this field

label.title: Field Label
label.description: Display label shown to the user for this field

required.title: Required Flag
required.description: Whether this field is mandatory for form submission

disabled.title: Disabled Flag
disabled.description: Whether this field is disabled and cannot be edited

placeholder.title: Placeholder Text
placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in empty field (text, number, password, textarea types)

description.title: Field Description
description.description: Helper text providing additional information about the field

validators.title: Field Validators
validators.description: Validation rules applied to this field

minLength.title: Minimum Length
minLength.description: Minimum character length for text fields

maxLength.title: Maximum Length
maxLength.description: Maximum character length for text fields

min.title: Minimum Value
min.description: Minimum numeric value for number fields

max.title: Maximum Value
max.description: Maximum numeric value for number fields

pattern.title: Regex Pattern
pattern.description: Regular expression pattern for string validation (e.g., email, phone)

options.title: Select Options
options.description: Available options for select and checkbox fields

value.title: Option Value
value.description: Value to be stored when option is selected
